data.title: Medely launches workforce orchestration platform in healthcare, transforming labor management. Jan. 29.
data.description: Los Angeles, CA - On January 29, 2026, Medely unveiled its new workforce orchestration platform, representing a shift towards managing workforce operations rather than just staffing. Dubbed Talent Fusion, this platform aims to proactively address gaps in the workforce, differing from conventional staffing services.

data.title: WXYZ-TV in Detroit wins prestigious duPont-Columbia Award for 'Shielded' investigation into police misconduct.
data.description: WXYZ-TV in Detroit has received recognition with the prestigious Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award, one of the highest honors in journalism.

data.title: Quo integrates with Pipedrive to streamline customer communication and automate sales pipeline, enhancing front office automation.
data.description: Quo, a top AI-driven business phone system, has recently enhanced its front office automation with a new integration. This upgrade aims to streamline operations by minimizing manual CRM tasks, fostering better collaboration between sales and support departments. The company, based in San Francisco, unveiled this development on January 29, 2026. Formerly recognized as OpenPhone, Quo's latest integration signifies a significant step forward in optimizing efficiency and cohesion within teams.

data.title: Western & Southern Life ranked second in J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Individual Annuity Study, a national benchmark of customer satisfaction.
data.description: In the latest J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Individual Annuity Study, Western & Southern Life secured the second spot, showcasing its exceptional performance in the individual annuity market. This study, a reputable national indicator of customer satisfaction, evaluates customer experiences in key areas.

data.title: Inventor from Eufaula, Okla. creates HANG EZE to improve wall hanging; simplifies process, saves time. (CTK-1697)
data.description: A resident of Eufaula, Oklahoma, shared their inspiration behind creating a new product aimed at securely and appealingly hanging pictures and decorative items. The inventor introduced the HANG EZE to streamline the process and eliminate unnecessary steps. The product is designed to save time and ensure a hassle-free experience for users. The innovation was unveiled in Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026.

data.title: White Cap to acquire Colony Hardware in strategic deal, leading to collaboration in supplies and safety products.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 29, 2026, White Cap, a prominent provider of specialty construction supplies and safety products for contractors, announced its acquisition of Colony Hardware. Colony is a regional distributor in the U.S. offering tools, equipment, supplies, and safety products. This agreement marks a significant step for White Cap in expanding its market presence and product offerings.

data.title: 2026 TPG Awards winners across travel, credit cards, and loyalty announced, celebrating excellence in global travel.
data.description: In January 29, 2026, the 2026 awards ceremony took place in New York, celebrating outstanding achievements in the worldwide travel industry. The event recognized excellence in travel, credit cards, and loyalty programs. The Points Guy (TPG), a reliable media platform dedicated to enhancing travel experiences with minimal hassle, hosted the event to honor the best within the industry.

data.title: Cognizant and Kohler deepen collaboration for AI and cloud, multi-year deal for Kohler's digital transformation.
data.description: Kohler Co. is ramping up its digital transformation with a multi-year expansion initiative in collaboration with Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH), a top provider of digital engineering and enterprise cloud services. The endeavor, announced on January 29, 2026, aims to enhance operational flexibility and efficiency for Kohler. This partnership signifies a major strategic move for both companies as they take steps towards modernizing Kohler's digital infrastructure.

data.title: Italy's defense budget grew from $29.1 billion to $38.1 billion by 2025, with projected growth to 2030. Market trends and key acquisitions are analyzed.
data.description: A new report on the Italy Defense Market has been published by ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights into the industry. The report includes a forecast for market size and growth rate from 2025 to 2030. It delves into key market drivers, emerging technology trends, and challenges faced by participants. The report highlights budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, and the competitive landscape. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable information for stakeholders in the defense sector.

data.title: Bridge Defense wins $99.7M contract from USSOCOM. Will produce AI-enabled systems over 5 years.
data.description: Bridge Defense has secured a substantial contract worth $99.7 million from the U.S. Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) to manufacture advanced deployable edge compute systems empowered with artificial intelligence. The agreement spans five years. This transaction was made official on January 29, 2026, in Washington.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português issued senior preferred debt securities for MREL requirements.
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has announced the issuance of senior preferred debt securities specifically designed to meet the Minimum Requirement for Own Funds and Eligible Liabilities (MREL) regulations. These securities are part of the bank's strategy to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements. The amount of the issue and other pertinent details were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: New luxury home community by Toll Brothers opening in Rancho Murieta, California. Spacious homes in gated community.
data.description: The Robles Collection by Toll Brothers in Rancho Murieta provides expansive homes and top-tier amenities within a secure master-planned neighborhood.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific reports Q4 2025 earnings of $6.57/share, exceeding $6.45 estimate. Quarterly sales of $12.22B, 7% YoY increase. Organic revenue growth at 3%. CEO highlights successful operational performance and capital deployment in strengthening long-term competitive position.
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) announced their Q4 2025 earnings with adjusted earnings of $6.57 per share, surpassing the expected $6.45. The quarterly sales stood at $12.22 billion, reflecting a 7% increase compared to the previous year and beating the analyst consensus of $11.95 billion. The organic revenue growth was reported at 3%. Marc Casper, the Chairman, President, and CEO of Thermo, emphasized their successful navigation of the market challenges throughout the year and the utilization of their PPI Business System for enhanced operational performance. The company also made significant strides in capital deployment to strengthen their competitive position. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vietnam Laptop Import Guide 2023-2025 from ResearchAndMarkets.com offers industry overview and top 10 importing companies.
data.description: A report titled "Vietnam Laptop Import Guide 2023-2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The guide covers critical information concerning the Vietnamese Laptop industry, import market, and details about import companies for the specified period. Importing entities encompass a range of categories such as international brands, local distributors, ICT distributors, retail and e-commerce platforms, corporate, and institutional importers. Within the guide, key focus is placed on the top 10 importing companies to provide a comprehensive overview of the market landscape.
